TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: a tja kineljang aicu a ti medea i tua milimilingan nua segeris (Greece) mavan aljak a vavayan nua mazangilj nua secolchis i aites (Ae√ętes), a vuvu a vavayan nua cemas nua qadav i hilius . a kemasi sinansenay a tjiuguni ni hisiud (Hesiod) a tjevuta ti medea a kiseljang tjai djasun kati argunauc (Argonauts) namatazua i pasusangas tua 2700 a cavilj (700 BCE) a vinecikan tua milimilingan. == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: a ¶a kin…ô éaŇč ai ¶u a ti m…ôd…ôa i tua mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan nua s…ôg…ôris (gr…ô…ô ¶…ô) mavan a éak a vavajan nua mazaŇči é nua s…ô ¶u…≠ ¶his i ait…ôs (a…ô*t…ôs), a vuvu a vavajan nua ¶…ômas nua qadav i hi…≠ius . a k…ômasi sinans…ônaj a ¶iuguni ni hisiud (h…ôsiud) a ¶…ôvuta ti m…ôd…ôa a kis…ô éaŇč ¶ai …Časun kati argunau ¶ (argunauts) namatazua i pasusaŇčas tua **** a ¶avi é (*** b ¶…ô) a vin…ô ¶ikan tua mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan. == kasizuanan ==
S.FORM: a tja kineljang aicu a ti medea i tua milimilingan nua segeris (Greece) mavan aljak a vavayan nua mazangilj nua secolchis i aites (Ae√ętes), a vuvu a vavayan nua cemas nua qadav i hilius . a kemasi sinansenay a tjiuguni ni hisiud (Hesiod) a tjevuta ti medea a kiseljang tjai djasun kati argunauc (Argonauts) namatazua i pasusangas tua 2700 a cavilj (700 BCE) a vinecikan tua milimilingan. == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: a ¶a kin…ô éaŇč ai ¶u a ti m…ôd…ôa i tua mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan nua s…ôg…ôris (gr…ô…ô ¶…ô) mavan a éak a vavajan nua mazaŇči é nua s…ô ¶u…≠ ¶his i ait…ôs (a…ô*t…ôs), a vuvu a vavajan nua ¶…ômas nua qadav i hi…≠ius . a k…ômasi sinans…ônaj a ¶iuguni ni hisiud (h…ôsiud) a ¶…ôvuta ti m…ôd…ôa a kis…ô éaŇč ¶ai …Časun kati argunau ¶ (argunauts) namatazua i pasusaŇčas tua **** a ¶avi é (*** b ¶…ô) a vin…ô ¶ikan tua mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan. == kasizuanan ==
